channel.title: GitHub GDScript Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of GDScript in GitHub

item.title: uheartbeast/youtube-tutorials
item.description: A repository for holding all the source code to my YouTube tutorial videos.

item.title: droqen/magical-paradise-train
item.description: for the "100 in paradise" community jam x)

item.title: GDQuest/godot-open-rpg
item.description: Learn to create turn-based combat with this Open Source RPG demo ⚔

item.title: GDQuest/godot-demos
item.description: Dozens of free and open source demos for the Godot game engine

item.title: Orama-Interactive/Pixelorama
item.description: A free & open-source 2D sprite editor, made with the Godot Engine! Available on Windows, Linux, macOS and the Web!

item.title: RodZill4/material-maker
item.description: A procedural textures authoring and 3D model painting tool based on the Godot game engine

item.title: bitwes/Gut
item.description: Godot Unit Test. Unit testing tool for Godot Game Engine.

item.title: DataPlusProgram/Godot-GoldSrc-MDL-Importer
item.description: A plugin that allows you to import GldSrc .mdl model files into godot
